zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England,: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: Joane Woade於大約1590年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。她於1612年6月7日與John Norriss在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1676年2月20日在她的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾奧波恩 聖 喬治。

nameMeanings.name: Woade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ethiopian: from the personal name Wolde, which is interpreted as ‘my son’ in the Ge’ez or Amharic languages. It often forms part of a Christian name, such as Woldemariam , and in this case it translates as ‘son of’. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

North German: habitational name from either of two places so named in Mecklenburg or Pomerania or from Wolda in Lower Saxony. Possibly also a topographic name from an inflected form of Middle Low German wolt, walt ‘woods’.

variants.name: Woldemariam
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Mariam): from the male personal name Wolde Mariam, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of Mary’ (see Wolde and Mariam ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Woldemichael
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Michael): from the personal name Wolde Michael, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of St. Michael’ (see Wolde and Michael ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: Joane Woade was born about 1590, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Norriss on 7 June 1612, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 20 February 1676, in her hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Ogbourne St George, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane Woade est née environ 1590, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé John Norriss le 7 juin 1612, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 20 février 1676, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Ogbourne St George, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Joane Woade wurde um 1590 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat am 7. Juni 1612 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom John Norriss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 20. Februar 1676 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ogbourne St George, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Woadeは約1590年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた。1612年6月7日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでJohn Norrissと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1676年2月20日に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアオグボウルン スト ジョーッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Ogbourne St George, Wiltshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 오그보우른 스트 조지
ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: Joane Woade(은)는 대략 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1612년 6월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 John Norriss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1676년 2월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 오그보우른 스트 조지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joane Woade nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com John Norriss em 7 de junho de 1612, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 20 de fevereiro de 1676, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Ogbourne St George, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane Woade родилась около 1590 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Norriss 7 июня 1612 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 20 февраля 1676 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности огбурн ст джеордж, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
